# Savvy Dealer - Digital Marketing for Automotive Dealerships

> Savvy Dealer is an expert digital marketing agency specializing in automotive dealership marketing. We don't outspend the competition - we outsmart them.

## Company Info
- Name: Savvy Dealer
- Website: https://www.savvydealer.com
- Phone: (813) 501-3229
- Email: support@savvydealer.com
- Address: 2705 Wilson Rd, Land O Lakes, FL 34638
- Founded: 2020
- Service Area: United States

## Services
- Fully Managed Marketing: Complete automotive marketing solution with co-op management, vendor coordination, website, SEO, SEM, Facebook ads, design, and ROI tracking
- Facebook Ads: Hand-built, high-performing Facebook ads targeting current dealer inventory starting at $300/month
- Dealer SEO + GEO: Combined SEO and Generative Engine Optimization for visibility in Google AND AI-powered search (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini)
- PPC Ads: 90% search term-to-keyword match with exclusive market control and competitor keyword intelligence
- Vehicle Ads (VLA): Expert Performance Max management that eliminates budget waste on Google's Display Network
- Dealer Websites: AI-optimized, SEO-first websites with lightning-fast load times meeting Core Web Vitals
- Independent Dealer Websites: Mobile-first websites for independent and BHPH dealers with SEO and GEO built in
- Anti-Dashboard AI: AI-powered attribution and analytics (coming soon)

## Key Differentiators
- Market exclusivity: No competing dealers in the same market
- Transparent reporting and clear attribution
- Hand-built campaigns, not AI-generated
- 90% search term-to-keyword match for PPC
- Combined SEO + GEO strategy for traditional and AI search
- Bi-weekly optimization cadence

## Team
- Adam Gillrie, Director
- Nick Chivinski, VP of Sales
- David Frost, CTO
- Emily Shultz, Head of Operations
- Lucas Terwilliger, Strategist

## Case Study Results
- Banner Chevrolet: +838% verified users YoY, +340% VDP views, <1.5s mobile LCP, -25% media spend
- Brighton Ford: +47% conversions, +62% quality traffic, +38% paid media efficiency
- Lake Powell Ford & Alamo Ford: +68% lead volume, -32% cost per lead, +44% appointment rate

- /: Home
- /about: About us
- /products: All products overview

- /dealer-seo: SEO + GEO strategy
- /ppc-ads: PPC & SEM advertising
- /vehicle-ads: Vehicle listing ads management
- /dealer-websites: AI-optimized dealer websites
- /independent-dealer-websites: Independent dealer websites
- /anti-dashboard: Anti-Dashboard AI (coming soon)
- /resources: Marketing guides and playbooks
- /blog: Industry insights and articles
- /case-studies: Client success stories
- /book: Request a free audit
- /visibility-audit: Free AI visibility audit tool
